programme.title: Oh My God
programme.desc: After Kanji, an atheist, loses his shop in an earthquake, he decides to sue God. Later, society condemns him for his blasphemy, while Lord Krishna himself becomes Kanji's saviour.

programme.title: Kaanchi: The Unbreakable
programme.desc: After witnessing the death of her lover, Kaanchi leaves the village and sets out to take revenge on the murderer, who is the son of an influential politician.

programme.title: Boom
programme.desc: Three clueless models bumble their way into the Bombay underworld after hilariously botching a diamond smuggling deal to the Middle East.

programme.title: Bachchhan Paandey
programme.desc: To succeed in the film industry, Myra chooses Bachchhan Paandey, a notorious hooligan, as the main focus of her new movie. Things get complicated when the gangster decides to act in the film.

programme.title: Coolie No. 1
programme.desc: A matchmaker sets out to teach Hoshiyar Chand a lesson while hilarity ensues when he asks Raju, a coolie, to pretend to be a millionaire.

programme.title: Laadla
programme.desc: Raju, an upright union leader, can do anything at his wheelchair-bound mother's behest, even if it means breaking his own heart and giving in to a rude heiress.

programme.title: The Hero: Love Story of a Spy
programme.desc: Arun Khanna, an Indian spy, collaborates with Reshma to stop a nuclear attack. However, Reshma's identity is compromised during her undercover mission in Pakistan.

programme.title: Dabangg
programme.desc: Chulbul Pandey, a police officer, battles a corrupt political leader, Cheddi Singh, who strains Chulbul's relationship with his step-brother.

programme.title: Khoonkhaar
programme.desc: Gagan, a brave young man, is unable to be with Sweety, his true love, due to her parents' disapproval of him. However, he vows to protect her after unknowingly saving her from gangsters.

programme.title: Fitoor
programme.desc: Noor, a Kashmiri boy from a poor family, is hired as a stable keeper by a begum. Later, when he begins to fall in love with Firdaus, the begum's daughter, she separates them by sending her away.

programme.title: Zid
programme.desc: Maya falls in love with Ronnie, a crime reporter, and gets obsessed with him. Things take a turn for the worse when they both get involved in a murder case.

programme.title: Acharya
programme.desc: On behalf of an idyllic temple town, Acharya takes up the cudgels against a tyrant whose greedy sights are set on the local natural resources.

programme.title: Hogi Pyaar Ki Jeet
programme.desc: Two brothers attempt to fulfil their dying father's wish by marrying two daughters of an old enemy, intending to exact revenge.

programme.title: Kaho Naa... Pyaar Hai
programme.desc: After the untimely death of her lover, Sonia sinks into depression. She soon moves abroad for a fresh start, unaware of the twisted fate that awaits her.

programme.title: Aparichit - The Stranger
programme.desc: A meek lawyer, frustrated with his inability to change the system, develops a vigilante alter-ego to mete out justice to criminals. However, the police soon set out to track down the vigilante.

programme.title: Ek Deewane Ki Deewaniyat
programme.desc: An influential politician and a headstrong megastar's fiery romance fuelled with passion brings absolute chaos, mania and melancholy.

programme.title: Bholaa
programme.desc: After getting out of prison with the desire to meet his daughter, Bholaa's plans are interrupted by a well-orchestrated drug bust.

programme.title: Naya Khoon
programme.desc: Siblings Vikram and Seema have contrasting personalities. However, things take a turn when Seema decides to marry Anand, but her brother opposes her decision.

programme.title: Ragini MMS 2
programme.desc: A director's decision to film an erotic horror movie in a haunted house brings trouble when a spirit possesses the body of the lead actress.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: When Tiwari receives a hefty order, he sets up his own factory.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti hears Tiwari and Prem plotting against the workers and joins their strike. Later, Prem and Tiwari attempt to bribe Vibhuti to betray the employees.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: After Rocky thrashes Vibhuti claiming Anita ordered it, she returns home. Later, Anita demands apologies from Prem and Tiwari.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: After writer Kalavati Sharma advises Anita and Angoori to monitor their husbands, they question them about women's perfumes. Meanwhile, Teeka and his friends launch an extortion business.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: After Saxena sprays women's perfume on Tiwari and Vibhuti, Kalavati doubts their intentions. On Prem's advice, the duo visits Baba Komalnath, while Saxena asks Tillu and Malkhan to break his leg.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: After getting outnumbered by thieves, Vibhuti lies to Anita that he was with a made-up friend. Suspecting a lie, Anita and Angoori investigate, while Ammaji thrashes Tiwari to get the truth.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: When Tiwari and Vibhuti suspect that their secret can be revealed, they are left tensed.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: After Tiwari and Vibhuti bring Gupta home and reveal the truth to their wives, Happu arrives to confiscate the looted goods. While Anita and Angoori console their husbands, Happu shuts down T Company.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: After Malang Baba forecasts Angoori's death in an accident involving three boys, Vibhuti fears for her life when he sees her new scooter. Later, Vibhuti stops Teeka and friends from driving.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: After Teeka and his friends leave with the vehicle, Vibhuti's desperate attempt to stop Angoori fails when Tillu hits her. Later, a protective Vibhuti warns Yamraj to stay away from her.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: After Vibhuti tampers with Angoori's scooter, Tillu hits him with his vehicle. While Anita and Tiwari team up for a prank to win a contest, Vibhuti begs Yamraj to spare Angoori.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: While Anita calls Tiwari home to scare him, Yamraj informs Vibhuti that Angoori must die. After Tiwari claims Angoori is no more, a furious Vibhuti thrashes Teeka and his friends.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: In an intoxicated state, Vibhuti tells Bhoorey Lal that he has caused Angoori to get pregnant. Later, Ammaji reveals her plot.

programme.title: Laal Ishq
programme.desc: A selfish Jaggu gets transported to the world of deception upon opening the magical gift and a beast hounds him. Soon, he takes the crazy man's advice and plays the illusory game to get out of there.

programme.title: Laal Ishq
programme.desc: Vaibhav from the Archaeology Department finds a magical pot and the pot's spirit lures him by promising to fulfil his wishes. But, for every wish he fulfils, he kills one of Vaibhav's family members.

programme.title: Paramavatar Shri Krishna
programme.desc: Lord Krishna, once a naughty little child, grows up and embarks on a number of adventures to fight and eradicate evil forces and provide justice to all.

programme.title: Vighnaharta Ganesh
programme.desc: Although Ganesh is brought to life by Mahadev, Parvati declines him as her son since she feels he is unrecognisable. Afterwards, Mahadev apprises Ganesh of his identity.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Angoori accidentally bumps into Saxena while going to a shop. Vibhuti slaps Saxena in order to impress Angoori; Saxena sneaks into Sharma House and beats up Manmohan instead of Vibhuti.

programme.title: Happu Ki Ultan Paltan
programme.desc: Happu engages Rajjo in conversation but Rajjo soon realises that something is burning. She turns to discover that she had left the hot iron on Ammaji's sari, damaging it beyond repair.

programme.title: Happu Ki Ultan Paltan
programme.desc: Rajesh fears informing Amma about her burnt favorite saree. Meanwhile, Happu receives orders from the Commissioner to apprehend the thief who stole her chain.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti tries to help Angoori win the challenge by stealing supplies from his own house and keeping it in Angoori's refrigerator. Later, Manmohan learns that Anita has decided to challenge Vibhuti.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Anita fumes at Happu for carrying rifle to hunt an innocent animal.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: While Vibhuti rejoices at the news of Angoori being alive, Saxena reveals that Yamraj was just his friend Kallan. Later, a rickshaw strike forces Tiwari and Vibhuti to find ways to help their wives.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: After lawyer Faqira informs Anita that she has inherited an expensive ring, the residents of Modern Colony attend her party to see it. Meanwhile, Teeka and his friends get ousted by their boss.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: After Tiwari's prank causes Vibhuti to swallow the expensive ring, Dr. Gupta suggests surgery while Angoori recommends a decoction. Meanwhile, Prem hires Teeka and his friends to abduct Vibhuti.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: After Tiwari and Angoori's concoction fails to help Vibhuti, Angoori calls Ammaji. Soon after, masked versions of Teeka and his friends abduct Vibhuti, prompting a furious reaction from Anita.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: While Teeka attempts to extract the ring from Vibhuti, Happu returns him home. Teeka and his friends realize Prem orchestrated the abduction, as Anita, Tiwari, and Angoori feed Vibhuti another remedy.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: After Vibhuti claims he flushed the ring, Tiwari successfully recovers it from the sewer, only for a jeweller to reveal it is fake. Later, Saxena compensates Teeka and his friends.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: After Tiwari and Angoori's concoction fails to help Vibhuti, Angoori calls Ammaji. Soon after, masked versions of Teeka and his friends abduct Vibhuti, prompting a furious reaction from Anita.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: While Teeka attempts to extract the ring from Vibhuti, Happu returns him home. Teeka and his friends realize Prem orchestrated the abduction, as Anita, Tiwari, and Angoori feed Vibhuti another remedy.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!

programme.title: Pulival Kalyanam
programme.desc: Harikrishnan is an adopted younger brother of Karunan. When Karunan loses his right hand in an accident, Harikrishnan decides to look after his family.

programme.title: Aakasam
programme.desc: Manoharan leads a peaceful life with his family. However, fear engulfs him when he realises that a sketch of a wanted terrorist resembles him.

programme.title: Calcutta News
programme.desc: Ajit, an anchor in Kolkata, meets Krishnapriya, who has lost her husband under mysterious circumstances. However, things become complicated when he falls for her while helping to find her spouse.

programme.title: Srungaravelan
programme.desc: Kanan falls in love with Raddhu, the daughter of a ruthless city gangster responsible for numerous deaths. To marry her, Kanan must confront the dangers and challenges that lie ahead.

programme.title: Classmates
programme.desc: A group of college friends meet after many years for a class reunion. However, due to some unexpected turn of events, several dark secrets are revealed, which changes their lives.

programme.title: Lucifer
programme.desc: The demise of the leader of a political party leads to a massive power struggle. Amidst the chaos, a mystical man named Stephen comes in to ascend the throne.

programme.title: Jai Sulthan
programme.desc: Sultan, a motherless child, is raised by a group of criminals working for his father. However, when his father dies, he decides to reform the group into better people.

programme.title: Natturajavu
programme.desc: Pulikkattil, an affluent family man, is forced to bear the brunt and burden of his late father's unscrupulous past. Now, Karnan, a jail convict, decides to settle some old scores with him.

programme.title: Love Action Drama
programme.desc: Dinesh, a conceited and wealthy young bachelor, goes to extreme lengths to impress a girl named Shobha with the help of his best friend Sagar, and Dinesh eventually hopes to marry Shobha.

programme.title: Liger : Saala Ctossbreed
programme.desc: Liger, an ambitious MMA fighter, trains hard to rise through the ranks, dreaming of fighting like his idol, Mark Anderson, and getting noticed.

programme.title: Cheriya Kallanum Valiya Policum
programme.desc: Sadasivan comes across a house where the owner, Kumaran, has committed suicide to protect his wife, Soumini. However, what is even stranger is that a man who is visually challenged is always around.

programme.title: Oru Thekkan Thallu Case
programme.desc: A respected lighthouse keeper uncovers his neighbor's affair, leading to a violent attack. He seeks revenge on his attacker one by one.

programme.title: June
programme.desc: June, a teenager, believes that there is nothing remarkable about her. She experiences adolescent crushes, handles heartbreaks and fights insecurities as she grows into a mature and confident woman.

programme.title: Premam
programme.desc: While George's first love disappoints him, Malar, a college lecturer, restores his faith in love. His romantic journey takes him through several stages and helps him find his purpose.

programme.title: Oru Yamandan Premakadha
programme.desc: Lallu, a happy-go-lucky person who loves to hang out with his friends, is in pursuit of true love. One day, he finds a photo of a missing woman, Diya, in the newspaper and feels a spark.

programme.title: Captain
programme.desc: A captain leads his team of soldiers inside a forest to investigate mysterious disappearances. However, they soon realise that the danger is more than they bargain for.

programme.title: Shiva Shakthi
programme.desc: Shambuki and Diti, driven by dark motives, conspire to invite Lord Shiva and Parvati to Tarakasura's wedding. Despite Shiva's refusal, Parvati accepts Diti's invitation. Will evil prevail over good?

programme.title: Shiva Shakthi
programme.desc: Lord Shiva's anger flares when Shambuki and Diti insult Goddess Parvati for her infertility and reject her blessings.
